description_long: This object depicts a highly stylized adult pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a dramatically stretched torso. The figure's arms are extended upward and outward, merging into a pair of wide, draped, fabric-like structures that create a V-shape above the head. The head is proportionally small, with a detailed face and short hair, while the body is dressed in a long-sleeved shirt and fitted pants. The legs are bent at sharp angles, giving the impression of dynamic movement or strain, and the feet are clad in formal shoes. The overall form is surreal and abstract, with the fabric elements appearing glossy and smooth, contrasting with the matte finish of the clothing. This figure would stand out in any urban environment due to its unusual proportions and dramatic pose.
description: A surreal adult pedestrian with elongated limbs, a small head, and arms stretched into glossy, draped fabric above. The figure wears a long-sleeved shirt, fitted pants, and formal shoes, posed in a dynamic, angular stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, arms stretched upward into wide, glossy fabric, and sharply bent legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme elongation of the torso and arms, with the head and face in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the draped fabric converging at the neck, and the backs of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the elongated body and limbs, with the face in profile and the fabric extending outward.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved shirt and fitted pants with formal shoes
attribute_posture: arms raised and stretched, body bent at sharp angles
